description: A guest calls to book a standard king room for two nights.

nodes.task_description: Check room availability for the requested dates.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms that standard king rooms are available.

nodes.task_description: Provide the guest with the room rate and collect their personal details.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent quotes the correct rate and accurately records the guest's name and contact information.

nodes.task_description: Create the reservation in the system and obtain credit card details to guarantee the booking.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the reservation and securely adds the payment guarantee.
